Notice Of Motion And Motion 1) To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set 1; 2) For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions, Set 1, Be Deemed Admitted; And 3) For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf;
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Shawn Manji's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions, Set One, Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendant's Special Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $700, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
